query: What are the docket numbers for the filings Google submitted to FERC between June and December 2024? Use your FERC docket tool
final_answer:
Based on the FERC docket search results, Google submitted filings with the following docket numbers between June and December 2024:

**Docket Numbers:**
- **AD24-11-000** (Filed: 12/10/2024) - Post-Technical Conference Comments of Google LLC
- **ER10-2835-012** (Filed: 12/27/2024) - Triennial Market Power Analysis for Southwest Power Pool Inc. Region of Google Energy LLC
- **ER24-2891-000, ER24-2888-000, ER24-2890-000, ER24-2893-000, ER24-2894-000, ER24-2889-000** (Filed: 09/19/2024) - Motion to Intervene of Google LLC (multiple dockets)
- **ER10-2835-011** (Filed: 11/05/2024) - Supplement to Notice of Change in Status of Google Energy LLC
- **ER10-468-005** (Filed: 06/28/2024) - Triennial Market Power Analysis for Central Region of Google Energy LLC

In total, Google filed documents in **8 unique docket numbers** during this period, with one filing covering multiple related dockets (ER24-2891 et al.).
